languages.title: Languages
languages.subtitle: Languages users can pick from in their profile
languages.name: Name
languages.createDesc: Use an ISO 639-1 code (e.g. "ta" for Tamil, "bn" for Bengali). Once enabled, every user can pick this language in their profile and saved text is auto-translated to it.
languages.removeConfirm: Remove language? Existing translations to this language will be deleted.
dashboard.topOutletsSubtitle: Ranked by revenue across the platform
staff.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone, email, role, outlet…
staff.outletScopedHint: New staff belong to this outlet and aren't visible at business level.
staff.permissionsHint: Defaults follow the selected role. Untick to revoke a role perm for this staff member, or tick a perm outside the role to grant it as an exception.
staff.confirmDeactivateMsg: Deactivate {{name}}? They will no longer be able to log in.
kitchen.title: Kitchen Display
kitchen.socketTitleReconnecting: Reconnecting — orders will sync once the channel is back
kitchen.bellMutedTitle: Bell is muted — right-click to unmute
kitchen.bellOnTitle: New-order bell on — tap to test, right-click to mute
kitchen.fullscreenEnter: Full screen — good for kitchen monitors or landscape phones
kitchen.toastNoPrinter: No printer assigned to this station
kitchen.toastNotPairedAuto: Auto-print is on but the printer hasn't been paired yet. Tap "Connect printer" once.
kitchen.toastNotPairedItem: Printer not paired yet. Tap "Connect printer" once.
orders.title: Orders
orders.fullscreenEnter: Full screen (good for landscape on mobile)
orders.socketReconnectingTitle: Reconnecting — orders will sync once the channel is back
orders.socketOfflineTitle: Real-time channel disconnected — orders may be stale
orders.emptyHint: Try adjusting your filter or search
orders.refundTooltip: File a refund (partial or full) against this order
orders.splitBillTooltip: Split the bill across multiple cash payers
orders.printReceiptTitle: Send the receipt to the configured bluetooth printer
orders.printPackingSlipTitle: Print a packing slip (items + quantities, no prices) for the delivery parcel
orders.courseHeldTitle: Held until prior course is served
orders.toastReceiptPrinter: Receipt printer paired — auto-print is armed
orders.toastQueuedNetwork: Queued — will sync when network is back
orders.toastRefundFiled: Refund filed — review on the Refunds page for approval
orders.toastAutoPrintNag: Order {{number}} arrived but the printer isn't paired this session. Tap "Connect printer" to enable auto-print.
orders.toastReceiptAutoFailed: Receipt auto-print failed — use the manual button
orders.toastAutoFailedManual: Auto-print failed — use the manual button
placeOrder.noItemsAvailable: Currently there are no items available
placeOrder.outletClosedBanner: Outlet is currently closed. Place Order is disabled.
placeOrder.outletClosedBannerWithReason: Outlet is currently closed · {{reason}}. Place Order is disabled.
placeOrder.cartEmptyNewFlow: No new items yet — pick from the menu
placeOrder.cartEmpty: No items yet — pick from the menu
placeOrder.noOpenTabs: No open tabs yet. Add items below to start one.
placeOrder.toastNoPrinterConfigured: No receipt printer configured for this outlet
placeOrder.toastCachedMenu: Using cached menu — you appear to be offline
placeOrder.toastCouldNotLoadMenu: Could not load menu and no cache is available
placeOrder.toastReceiptPairedArmed: Receipt printer paired — auto-print is armed
placeOrder.toastPickTable: Pick a table before placing this order
placeOrder.toastAutoPrintNag: Order {{number}} arrived but the printer isn't paired this session. Tap "Connect printer" to enable auto-print.
menu.subtitleTemplate: Master template · {{cats}} categories · {{items}} items — outlets import from here
menu.outletBadgeTitle: Imports and edits land on this outlet
menu.importFromBusinessTitle: Pick items from the business master menu
menu.optimizeImagesTitle: Re-compress old item images to the current size cap. Safe to run anytime.
menu.noOutletHint: Create an outlet first to manage its menu.
menu.noBusinessAttached: No business attached to your account
menu.multipleMenusDescTemplate: Run separate menus (e.g. Breakfast / Lunch) with their own categories and timings.
menu.multipleMenusDescOutlet: Show multiple menus to customers and staff at this outlet. When off, only the default menu is visible.
menu.disableMenuAtOutlet: Disable this menu at this outlet
menu.enableMenuAtOutlet: Enable this menu at this outlet
menu.noMenuHintImport: Start from scratch or pick items from the business master menu.
menu.setAvailabilityHoursSub: Set availability hours for this subcategory
menu.setAvailabilityHoursItem: Set availability hours for this item
menu.visibleTitle: Visible on customer menu — tap to hide (item still usable inside bundles)
menu.hiddenTitle: Hidden from customer menu — tap to show
menu.placeholderLongDesc: Detail view — ingredients, serving info, etc.
menu.imageHint: JPG, PNG or WebP, up to 4 MB. The image will be auto-adjusted as needed to fit the platform's display specifications.
menu.subImageHint: JPG / PNG / WebP. ≤300 KB. Shown on the customer Place Order screen.
menu.longDescHint: Shown in the item detail view.
menu.gstHint: Applied to this item by default. Customer tag / dine-in section can override below. SGST and CGST are auto-split 50/50 on the bill.
menu.parcelCustomCharge: Use a custom parcel charge for this item (otherwise outlet default applies)
menu.quantityUnitHintPortion: Customer picks a portion size from the predefined list below.
menu.variantsHintNumber: Add sizes like Half / Full / Family. Each variant has its own price; short description is optional.
menu.variantsHintGrams: Add portion sizes in grams (e.g. 100, 250, 500). The customer picks one.
menu.variantsHintMillilitres: Add portion sizes in millilitres (e.g. 200, 400, 750). The customer picks one.
menu.noVariants: No variants — item is sold at the base price.
menu.noSizesYet: No sizes yet — add at least one portion size for the customer to pick from.
menu.noToppings: No toppings defined yet — create some in the Toppings page.
menu.toppingOverrideTitle: Override the base price for this item (leave blank to use base)
menu.visibleOnMenuHint: (uncheck for bundle-only items, e.g. mini dosa)
menu.printSeparatelyHint: (token + just this line — helps service identify items with custom toppings/variants)
menu.addMoreStockHint: To add more stock, close this form and use the green "+ Stock" button on the item row.
menu.bundleHint: (combo / thali — at order time the kitchen sees each child as a separate prep ticket; the customer pays the bundle's price)
menu.bundleDescribe: Add the items that make up this bundle. Each row is one component (e.g. 2× idly, 1× sambar, 1× filter coffee). Quantities multiply with the bundle order quantity.
menu.bundleCustomerPicksHint: (leave 0 to include everything — set N to let customer choose any N of the rows)
menu.bundleNoComponents: No components yet. Add at least one.
menu.priceModalSubtitle: Base ₹{{price}}. Leave a cell blank to inherit the item default.
menu.priceModalSubtitleWithGst: Base ₹{{price}} · default GST {{gst}}%. Leave a cell blank to inherit the item default.
menu.priceModalNoTags: No customer tags or dine-in sections defined for this outlet yet.
menu.gstTagTitle: Optional GST % for this tag — overrides item default
menu.gstSectionTitle: Optional GST % for this dine-in section — overrides item default
menu.importDialogTitleFallback: Import from Business menu → this outlet
menu.importDialogSubtitle: Pick a category, subcategory, or individual items. Picking a category brings its whole tree across (including empty subs). Imported rows are independent copies at this outlet — the business template is untouched.
menu.importNothingPicked: Nothing picked yet. Use the checkboxes to select what to bring across.
menu.importSummaryLine_one: {{n}} new item will be created. {{cats}} categories, {{subs}} subcategories, {{items}} item-only picks.
menu.importSummaryLine_other: {{n}} new items will be created. {{cats}} categories, {{subs}} subcategories, {{items}} item-only picks.
menu.importSummaryBanner: Imported {{cats}} categor(y/ies), {{subs}} subcategor(y/ies), {{items}} item(s) into your outlet.
menu.importEmptyBusiness: The business hasn't published any categories yet.
menu.importNoItemsInSubKept: No items in this subcategory — the empty sub will still be copied
menu.importNoSubsKept: No subcategories yet — the empty category will still be copied
menu.timingsOutletOverride: Outlet override — these slots take precedence over the business-level timings while saved. Clear all slots and save to fall back to the business defaults.
menu.timingsEmpty: No timing slots — this menu is always available. Click "Add slot" to restrict it.
menu.availabilityIntro: Leave empty to inherit from the outlet's hours. Add one or more slots to restrict this {{kind}} to specific days & times — orders outside the window will be greyed out for customers and rejected at submit.
menu.availabilityEmpty: No custom schedule — this {{kind}} follows the outlet's hours.
menu.toastImagesOnly: Only JPG, PNG or WebP images are allowed
menu.confirmDeleteMenu: Delete menu "{{name}}"? Categories must be moved or removed first.
menu.toastBundleCap: "Customer picks N" can't exceed the {{count}} components you've added
menu.toastBundleCap_one: "Customer picks N" can't exceed the {{count}} component you've added
menu.toastStockPositive: Enter a whole number greater than 0
menu.addStockPrompt: Add stock to "{{name}}". How many to add?
menu.toastImagesAllOptimized: All images are already optimized — nothing to do
menu.confirmOptimize_one: Re-compress {{count}} item image to 400px / 70% quality? Existing photos are reused, no re-upload needed.
menu.confirmOptimize_other: Re-compress {{count}} item images to 400px / 70% quality? Existing photos are reused, no re-upload needed.
menu.toastPickSomething: Pick at least one category, subcategory or item
menu.toastImportedNone: Nothing new was imported — everything is already at this outlet
menu.toastSlotEndAfterStart: Each slot must end after it starts
menu.toastScheduleCleared: Schedule cleared — inheriting from outlet hours

dues.printTitle: Open the print dialog. The .print-hide chrome below is suppressed in print CSS.

dues.collectedInRangeHint: Sum of settlements in the settlements window
dues.empty: No customers with pay-later activity at this outlet yet.
dues.amountHint: Partial settle is allowed; you can't enter more than the outstanding balance.

parcelDesk.subtitle: Pack parcels coming out of the kitchen and hand them over to customers as they collect.

parcelDesk.lanePackSubtitle: Kitchen finished — pack the parcel and mark it ready for handover.
parcelDesk.laneHandoverSubtitle: Parcel packed — waiting for the customer to collect.

customers.noMatchesHint: Try a different name or phone.
customers.emptyHint: Customers will appear here after their first order at this outlet.
customers.modalAddSubtitle: Capture a customer's phone now; orders made later will link automatically.
disputes.title: Dispute Management
disputes.subtitle: Review and resolve customer disputes
disputes.searchPlaceholder: Search by order number, customer name, phone, description…
disputes.resolutionPlaceholderExplain: Explain how the issue was resolved, refund issued, etc.
disputes.issueRefundHint: Order moves to <forRefund>For Refund</forRefund> instead of <resolved>Resolved</resolved>. Mark as <refundComplete>Refund Complete</refundComplete> on the order once paid out.
disputes.modalRaiseSubtitle: On behalf of a customer for an order at this outlet
disputes.descriptionPlaceholder: What went wrong? e.g. wrong item served, food cold, missing parcel item…
